description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude human figure kneeling on both knees atop a rectangular marble base. The figure is rendered in a classical style, with smooth, flowing contours and realistic anatomical details. The subject's arms are raised, with one hand behind the head and the other bent at the elbow, creating a dynamic and expressive pose. The base is made of green marble with white veining, providing a striking contrast to the white or light gray stone of the figure. The overall craftsmanship suggests a focus on elegance and naturalism, with careful attention to the musculature and posture. The sculpture is likely intended as a decorative or commemorative piece for public or garden settings.
description: A classical-style nude human figure kneeling on a green marble base, with arms raised in an expressive pose. The sculpture features smooth, realistic contours and detailed anatomy.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back, legs, and arms of the kneeling figure, with the head turned and one arm bent behind the head.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the curvature of the back, the positioning of the legs, and the marble base.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the figure's profile, the raised arms, and the detailed anatomy of the torso and legs.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the chest, face, and both arms raised, with the figure's expressive posture most visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
